it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Board

  • Uses of BoardMemento in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Board

    Classes in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Board that implement interfaces with type arguments of type BoardMemento
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Board
    The Mesos game board, containing the offer tiles (where players place their totems during the placing phase) and the default tiles (where players return at the end of each round to collect food).
    Methods in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Board that return BoardMemento
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    BoardMemento
    Board.createMemento()
    Creates a memento capturing the current order of players on default tiles.
    Methods in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Board with parameters of type BoardMemento
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    Board.restoreMemento(BoardMemento memento)
    Restores the board state from the given memento, removing all players from default tiles and offer tiles in preparation for repositioning.
